entry.title: Error in Object Dependency Procedure
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a procedure using CU01 and am attempting to clear a characteristic value of the 'Date Format' data type.The following is the OD code, which is currently producing a syntax error. The error disappears if I remove t line# 2. Could you please help me resolve this issue?

 

 

 $SELF.DELTA_FLAG ?= 'N' IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' ',
 $SELF.CHANGE_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ?= ' 'IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' ',
 $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP = 'X' IF $SELF.REF_DELTA_TEMP EQ ' '.

 

 

Regards,

Mukhtar

SAP Variant Configuration and PricingPLM Variant Configuration

entry.title: Re: Integrating with SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs using SAML Bearer Assertion

we have followed all the steps mentioned above and added Groups as well in our IAS tenant.

what may be the reason ?

 

"xs.saml.groups": [
"sac"
],
"xs.rolecollections": [
"sac.users"
]

 

 

Thank you,

Himanshu

I need a report which shows those columns, unfortunately could not create one myself and I feel like I am lost. Can someone please guide me?

The data I want to see:

BP Number

BP Name

Comm. method

E-mail address

Regards,

Bilge

entry.title: SAP NPV for migrated leases
entry.content:
Hi All,

Has any one implemented note 3136768 - Enhancement (BAdI): Exclusive calculation start for initial valuation,

can you please share more details about it, does it allow to have a user specified NPV value at the lease start date in SAP i.e the migration date.

Regard,

Charmaine

entry.title: Re: SBO Mail not working in New installation 10.0 FP2402
entry.content:
Hi gonzalogomez

Please help to perform the below tsk and see if this helps:

1. Please deactivate all the databases from the Alert service. You can try disable the "Job Service Alert" from General Settings for all the databases.

2. Please try check each database one by one and see if you are able to get the test alert for any user?   

3. Kindly also make sure that if you have many active alerts in any other database, please keep this test with simple database first to be sure if the issue is with Database specific or with Job Service itself. 

4. From the SLD login window, please select the instance and all the databases, click the Refresh the Database User and see if this makes any difference?

5. If possible, please try create a latest backup of any database, restore it with different name (like a test database) and check the alert only for this test database and see if this works for you?

6. Please check the same after restart the Servertools and Service Layer services to see if this works now?

7. Kindly make sure that the SAP Business One Services are running the Admin / root user privileges. 

8. If nothing helped, kindly collect all the mentioned logs as per this SAP Note "2419141" and share the correct date and time from your test.  Please create incident using component SBO-BC-JOB and attach all information collected in this step 8.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: Regarding FBL1N transaction report
entry.content:
Hi, Priya, we have a similar requirement as above could you please provide the code which you have.

 

Thanks 

vijay

entry.title: Re: SQL Database to datasphere vis DP connetor
entry.content: Hello @XaviPolo,

entry.title: Re: SQL Database to datasphere vis DP connetor
entry.content: The SQl database is on-prem. Yes I have erver/port . You mean to say is I need to install SAP Cloud Connector on our server or SQL or anything else ?

entry.title: Re: Object Detection with YOLOv8 and SAP Digital Manufacturing (Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi @RobertRiedel,

Thank you so much for the post it was really helpful. 


Regards,
Sayuj.

entry.title: Re: SQL Database to datasphere vis DP connetor
entry.content: Yes to allow DSP (cloud) to access your SQL Server (on-prem) you need a "tunnel" to allow connection between both worlds. So you need SCC installed in a local server. It can be on the SQL Server, although I prefer to have it on another intermediate server, that is close enough to the SQL Server so that it does not add latency to the communication.

entry.title: SAP B1 Continuous Stock with Germany Localization
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we are an international group that is setting up a new company in Germany and we need to start a new DB in SAP as a test company for the German company.

While we are waiting for the meeting with the tax consultant, we would like to start the new DB and I'm asking the community people here located in Germany what Inventory Management system you use in SAP B1 with German localization. In Germany do you typically use Continuous Stock (perpetual inventory with accounting postings) or you use periodic inventory? And what Evaluation method do you typically use in Germany? Standard, Average or FIFO? Is the Standard method even allowed in Germany?

Thank you guys!

entry.title: Is SAP Leave Management still available in S/4?

entry.title: Re: XSA ODATA V4 POST Error - {code: "400" Deserialization Error: Unexpected end of JSON i

entry.title: Re: XSA ODATA V4 POST Error - {code: "400" Deserialization Error: Unexpected end of JSON i
entry.content: This was my issue, thank you for sharing. I fixed it by adding a specific path to my app.use(express.json()), like so: app.use('/path', express.json()).

entry.title: Service Contract invoicing incorrect
entry.content:
Hi,
I invoiced a service contract via VF01, then noticed it was wrong and made a credit for it.

There were two invoice lines which needs to be removed, and those were set to 0 in VA42. After this tried to invoice, but it comes as incorrect status and can't make the invoice. 

Do you know how this should be handled? 

Thanks,

Jenny

entry.title: Re: Pin to Home option not available in SAC ODE mode
entry.content:
Just to confirm. Are you looking for a workaround for "Pin to Home" or one of the other limitations. There is definitely no workaround for "Pin to Home" in ODE at this time.

 

We will publish more information on watchlist as we get closer to the date where it will be released and we will at some point be seeking customer feedback on the topic so please stay tuned.

entry.title: Re: stop return s.o to be created when returned quantity...
entry.content: In standard, system will trigger a warning message and user can very well stop further processing or proceed with creating a return sale order over and above the billed quantity.  In case, you want to restrict this, go to OVAH, select message class V4 no 229 and change from W to E. Now create a return sale order over and above the original billed quantity and update here

entry.title: Re: Demystifying Document Management Service on BTP
entry.content:
Hello, thanks for this informative blog post... I have some very basic questions though, I can't seem to wrap my head around ...

Your first point is 1. Connect BTP DMS with S/4HANA on-premise:

But I have a bit different use case ... We developed a python application that connects to on-prem HANA DB. This python app then generates some PDFs and we need to upload them somewhere.

So i suppose, i don't have to connect DMS TO S/4HANA directly?

 

We have Object Store up and running with S3 , can this be used as repository?

What even is repository in this context?

Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: 999 – The Number of the BSEG
entry.content: After experience in real implementations in Hana and with open items, It will be better extend 6 digits BSEG-BUZEI. The theory is the theory. For example update douments with more 999 items in big companies.

entry.title: Re: Modeling an advanced Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @rohanc38,

Do you mean that you want to prompt an SAC user for choosing the hierarchy, when opening the report? This is not possible at time of writing nor is there such feature on the road map at time of writing. Users can choose their hierarchies in SAC using the default hierarchy selection from the dimensions.

entry.title: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALES_ORDER_SRV) using Date values
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Good day.
I need to  set up a filter condition on oData API (API_SALES_ORDER_SRV)

(CreatedByUser eq 'BTPDEVUSER' and (CreationDate ge datetimeoffset'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00.0000000'Z'}- ${property.p_daysInPast}' and CreationDate le datetimeoffset'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00.0000000'Z'}'))

however this filter condition could not help me to get the records at all.
Could you please provide some hints, how this filter condition would be set up

Thanks & Regards,
Sateesh N

entry.title: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALES_ORDER_SRV) using Date values
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I need to  set up a filter condition on oData API (API_SALES_ORDER_SRV)

(CreatedByUser eq 'BTPDEVUSER' and (CreationDate ge datetimeoffset'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00.0000000'Z'}- ${property.p_daysInPast}' and CreationDate le datetimeoffset'${date:now:yyyy-MM-dd'T'00:00:00.0000000'Z'}'))

however this filter condition could not help me to get the records at all.
Could you please provide some hints, how this filter condition would be set up

Thanks & Regards,
Sateesh N

entry.title: ADT : Error trying to open object of ATC remote check
entry.content:
Hi experts

Context:
We have configured the Fiori application Abap Custom Code Migration on a Hana system SXX, and successfully executed a Central check on the ECC referenced system DYY.

After configuring ADT, I'm able to see the results of the ATC check in the ATC Result Browser tab, in section "Results of Central Checks Runs.

But once in the details section, I'm facing the following issues: 

1/ Trying to open the development objects

I have the error:

2/ Trying the recheck

I have the error

 

3/ No option to open the check in ATC Problems view. 

I have no dumps in ST22, nor explicit messages in SM21.

Many thanks for your help
Regads
Pierre

entry.title: Can you please share any available documents/blog posts on the SAP recommended connectivity between
entry.content:
Hello SAP RISE Connectivity Experts,

Can you please share any available documents / blog posts on the recommended connectivity between S/4HANA hosted in RISE on GCP and existing SAP applications (eg: BW, BPC) hosted in customer's own Azure subscription?

This is required to support a business over the interim period of converting SAP ERP to S/4HANA on RISE Private Cloud.

Background/overview as follows:

  1. Existing systems (ERP, BW, BPC, few others) are hosted on customer's own Azure subscription.
  2. Customer wants to convert ERP to RISE with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPx on GCP.
  3. Post-conversion, during an interim period, they are looking to work with S/4HANA on RISE GCP with BW and BPC on Azure.
  4. As a long term plan, they would move to a combination of latest available data components either on RISE or on SAP BTP or SaaS (eg: Datasphere, SAC, BW/4HANA on RISE).

I am trying to find the optimum network / connectivity solution for the interim phase (steps 2 and 3 above).

Thanks in advance and best regards,

Shaji

entry.title: Re: Story Reports - Successfactors
entry.content: I guess there is a limit of 30 reports which can be imported. Last year I was trying same and it failed when the number of story reports was more than 30.

entry.title: Re: What’s New for SAP Build Apps – Mobile Authentication
entry.content: @Isyraf_Afifi Hi, thanks for reaching out. This feature is specific to the enterprise version of Build Apps, which runs on top of SAP's Business Technology Platform (BTP). With the authentication feature, mobile apps can be more securely integrated with BTP resources on the backend, and the app's end users will be prompted to sign in so they can access it.

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content: Is there any option to allow upload data to a hierarchy node?

entry.title: Re: Working with SAP Service Cloud Version 2 Add-on, for Utilities
entry.content:
Hi Ankita,

at this point we do not have the support for alerts in SAP Service Cloud Version 2 - this is something we have on the roadmap for 2025.

Best  Regards,

Steen

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano  ,

I'm a recent Finance graduate from a small seaside town in Vietnam. As the first in my family to attend university, I'm proud of my academic achievements and eager to continue learning and growing professionally.

I've always been fascinated by the power of technology to transform businesses, and my interest in SAP grew as I began my career path in an SAP ERP Project. I believe that becoming an SAP consultant would allow me to combine my financial knowledge with my passion for technology, ultimately helping businesses streamline their operations and achieve their goals.

Earning an SAP certification is a crucial step in my career path, and I'm incredibly grateful for this initiative and the opportunity to potentially achieve this goal. I'm confident that the skills and knowledge I'll gain from this program will be invaluable as I embark on my journey as an SAP consultant.

I'm excited to learn from experienced mentors, connect with fellow learners, and contribute to this vibrant community.

Thank you for considering my application!

entry.content: Nice blog post, thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Costing sheet in networks and network activities
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I could use your help with a topic.

I have a project strucuture composed by project definition, WBS, networks and network activities. When I create a project by copy of the standard structure, the correct costing sheet is copied. However, the costing sheet that is populated by default on the networks (standard costing sheet for production orders) is not correct and nor is the one populated in the network activities (Z costing sheet for production orders). Can anyone tell me where this is defined in the customizing?

I searched everywhere but could not find it... I'm not sure if this might not be related to the order type and someone must have added it to PP customizing since the costing sheets appearing are production ones.

Thanks in advance, Mari.

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALES_ORDER_SRV) using Date values
entry.content: It looks like you are trying to retrieve all orders created by BTPDEVUSER in which case the easiest filter to use would be CreatedByUser eq 'BTPDEVUSER'

entry.title: HANA Design-Time HDI composite role
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to create a design-time HDI composite role using roles created in other HDI schemas. I use HANA XSA with SP7 and have containers A and B with schema roles, then I create container C with a composite role.

  1. Add services in mta for A and B
  2. Grant the roles of A and B via .hdbgrants to #OO of container C
  3. add UPS service in mta and grant system privilege ROLE ADMIN via .hdbgrants to #OO of container C
  4. Create composite role .hdbrole using schema_roles with the same roles of A and B. I can see and select the roles of A and B in the Role Editor. 

The build of .hdbrole fails with "not authorized to access the referenced object" without a guid. I suspect because of absence "grantable to other" / with_admin_option for the roles in A, B in #OO of C.

#DI.GRANT_CONTAINER_SCHEMA_ROLES doesn't have a form with _WITH_GRANT_OPTION.

I don't want to use CATALOG roles because they are not transportable.

Does anyone know how to create a composite role right in XSA or HANA Cloud?

entry.title: Re: Code Descriptions in Reports out of EC
entry.content: In story report you have the option to report on code or description or both. Try story reporting and select the fields (like company,business unit etc) and you will see the option to select code or description accordingly.

Thanks in advance, Mari.

Hi @KatarzynaS ,

This is currently not possible. SAP advised us, if you want to combine data from different sources to use a separate/standalone SAC/BW system. To extract your data to such a system from v2 should be able at the end of this year.

Simon

entry.title: Re: C4C Service Ticket VS S4 Hana Service order vs S4 Han...
entry.content: Solution option A: Legacy system X -> s4 Hana Service order (SRVO) -> RE2 (Advance returns) if exchange required ->Warranty claim document in S4 Hana (IC &OC Versions)-> PO/Credit memo

entry.title: Identifying corresponding MRP Items give an order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need assistance with linking SAP tables for my stamping operation.
Specifically, I want to achieve the following:

For a given planned order (from the PLAF table) or a production order (from the AFKO/AFPO tables),
I want to retrieve all corresponding primary and secondary demands.

  • If an order is a primary, I want to get all MRP-generated items corresponding to this primary demand.
  • If an order is a secondary (SekBed), I want to identify its corresponding primary demand.

I would be thankful for any advice!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration: Understanding “Simple Signer” [5] : Security Enhancement
entry.content:
Can I use "forge" in iFlow? I would like to migrate the below code, which is used in the PostMan environment, to build the signature header.

function loadPrivateKey(privateKeyPem, privateKeyPassphrase) {
return forge.pki.decryptRsaPrivateKey(privateKeyPem, privateKeyPassphrase);
}


function buildEncodedSignature(privateKey, signingString) {
let messageDigest = forge.md.sha256.create();
messageDigest.update(signingString, "utf8");
let pss = forge.pss.create({
md: forge.md.sha256.create(),
mgf: forge.mgf.mgf1.create(forge.md.sha256.create()),
saltLength: 32
});
let signature = privateKey.sign(messageDigest, pss);
return base64UrlEncode(signature)
}

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content:
The reason you are not getting results is because your query filter is incorrectly formatted. A datetimeoffset does not include math regarding number of days, but rather a difference between UTC... e.g. eastern time zone is -05:00. Based on your expression it would be easier if you were to use datetime and reference KBA 2933028 for the proper syntax.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Resolving CDS view lifecycle impacts
entry.content: Rahul- what a well written and valuable summary of managing CDS views across S4 hana upgrade and data model related changes.

entry.title: Useful SP_TransactionNotification ChapterID Mandatory Item master Data Item Master SAP Business One
entry.content:
SAP b1 SP_TransactionNotification ChapterID Mandatory Item master Data Item Master

IF @transaction_type IN ('A', 'U') AND @object_type = '4'

BEGIN

If (SELECT T0.ChapterID FROM OITM T0 Inner Join OCHP t1 on T1.AbsEntry=T0.ChapterID where T0.ItemCode=@list_of_cols_val_tab_del) IS NULL

begin

SET @error = 10

SET @error_message = N'Please Add ChapterID In Item Master'

end

END

entry.title: Re: AT END of in Custom CDS S4HANA CLOUD
entry.content:
Hello, 

Yes, we can use the AT END OF functionality in a custom CDS view to sum up the results of columns based on keys defined in the CDS.

Take an example of a custom CDS view called ZCDS_SalesData, which has the following key fields: ProductID, SalesDate, and SalesAmount. If we want to create a calculated column that sums up the SalesAmount for each ProductID and SalesDate combination. We can achieve this by using the AT END OF functionality in the CDS view.

Here's an example of how we can do this:

"sql
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZCDS_SalesData'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Sales Data'
define view ZCDS_SalesData
as select from SalesData
{
key ProductID,
key SalesDate,
sum( SalesAmount ) as TotalSalesAmount
}
where ProductID = @ObjectKey.ProductID
group by ProductID, SalesDate
with
{
AT END OF ProductID,
key SalesDate,
sum( TotalSalesAmount ) as GrandTotalSalesAmount
}
"

In this example, we are creating a calculated column called TotalSalesAmount using the sum() function to sum up the SalesAmount for each ProductID and SalesDate combination. We then use the AT END OF functionality to create another calculated column called GrandTotalSalesAmount, which sums up the TotalSalesAmount for each ProductID.

This allows you to group and summarize the sales data based on the keys defined in the CDS view, and calculate the total sales amount for each combination of ProductID and SalesDate.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: About MF60 use?
entry.content: It has 2 warehouses. 1. Material warehouse --> The warehouse location where stocks are entered and stored. 2-Production warehouse --> Materials needed during production are transferred to this warehouse and planned orders are created in this warehouse location. Before production, we check the material readiness using the MF60 screen. This screen shows only the stocks in the production warehouse as available stock and gives a quantity deficit. In fact, it should show the quantity deficit using the total stock in production and material warehouse. Is there a method for this?

entry.title: Different number ranges for networks
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would like to have different number ranges for standard networks and "regular" networks.

I had a client that had the external number range for standard networks and the internal number range for the "regular" networks but I can't seem to fins where I can define this. Can anyone help me?

Thanks in advance, Mari.

entry.content:
Hi eonsase 

Regarding the RFQ customization , you can find documentation under B1if -> Scenarios -> Setup -> select "sap.B1RFQ" for scenario Package Identifier field -> Then click "Documentation" Button -> search for Section 3.3 "Adding a Custom  to the RFQ Template"

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How to configure DBA cockpit for SAP ase/sybase.
entry.content:
Note : This is valid for ABAP stack only.

Step 1 - Implement the latest version of SAP Note 2293673.(Pre-requisite note - 1668882)

Step 2 - Stop Job scheduler in Sybase DB server.

To stop Job Scheduler:

isql -Usapsa -S<SID> -X
use sybmgmtdb
go
sp_sjobcontrol @name=NULL, @option="stop_js"
go

>> To verify if the job scheduler has stopped, you can simply use ps -ef|grep -i sybsid and check if any OS process is running for Sybase job scheduler with sybsid user.  

Step 3 - Download the latest instbaldr.sql file from SAP Note:##2502193 and uncompress it. Execute the script with isql as user sapsa as below. If you see any privilege related issue in the execution logs, grant the necessary privilege with sa or sapsso user and rerun the script. Check the logs thoroughly before moving with next steps. 

isql -Usapsa -X -S<sapsid> -w999 -i instbaldr.sql

Step 4 - Activate BALDR as below. 

use saptools
go

SP_BALDR_ACTIVATE
go

Step 5 - Start Job Scheduler, use below commands. 

use sybmgmtdb

go

sp_sjobcontrol @name=NULL, @option="start_js"

go

Step 6 - Validate BALDR Activation 

use saptools

go

select [KEY], [VALUE] from DBH_CONFIG where [KEY] like 'BALDR%'

go

Step 7 - Generation of the Web Dynpro Runtime:

Call transaction SGEN
Select 'Generation of Web Dynpros'
Choose 'Continue'
Select software component 'SAP_BASIS'
Choose 'Continue'
Choose 'Continue'
Choose 'Start Job Directly'

Step 8 - Activate the SICF services as below

Call transaction SICF_INST.
Enter 'WEB DYNPRO ABAP' as technical name.
Choose 'Execute'.
Do the same for 'WEB DYNPRO DBA COCKPIT' and execute.
Then, Activate all NWBC ICF services - Tx SICF - Service Name - NWBC - F8 - Actvate all services. Finally, in SICF transaction, Go to default_host → sap → public → bc → uics.
Activate service UICS and its sub-nodes (which can be located under node UICS).

Step 9 - Add these parameters and restart SAP.

SAP profile parameters are required to configure HTTP(S) ports, timeouts and SSO  tickets. Call transaction RZ10 and ensure the following profile parameters are set as follows:

login/create_sso2_ticket = 2
login/accept_sso2_ticket = 1
icm/server_port_0 = PROT=HTTP,PORT=80$$,PROCTIMEOUT=600,TIMEOUT=600
icm/server_port_1 = PROT=HTTPS,PORT=443$$,PROCTIMEOUT=600,TIMEOUT=600

Note : At this point, the dbacockpit configuration is completely done. It should now be automatically loaded with default profiles for the ATM configuration too. You can go to the respective ATM template profiles and customize the various thresholds and finally schedule them as per the business requirements. 

 

Please hit the thumbs up if you find this useful 🙂 .. cheers !!

 

Reference SAP Notes : 2293673, 2502193, 1245200, 2731115

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content: I have used IF_SWF_FLEX_IFS_RUN_APPL_STEP~ON_CREATION_CALLBACK to see if I can update task container or not. But can't find a suitable api to put different values to task container.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Analytic Model Series Blog Post # 10– Design Multi Fact in Analytic Model
entry.content:
Hi Jai,

Cool. I see your target_volume is sum. I assume the result is correct. In such a case before multi-fact in analytic model is there. This can perfectly solve the issue the issue of different granularity of two different fact tables. As a product could be sold every day but a product plan is per quarter, here the joined result in step 4 of Opportunities_Header and Opportunities_Item has n:1 relationship  to Planned_Volumes.  

 

regards

Zili

entry.title: How to Activate only a specific range of Subscriber Accounts
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

in a SAP CC 5.0.6 having a single catalog where we have two ranges of subscriber accounts:

  • 9900XXXXX - range of subscriber accounts for service provider 1
  • 1100XXXXX - range of subscriber accounts for service provider 2

We stopped the automatic contract activation (by setting the ACTIVATION_SCHEDULER_ENABLED = FALSE). We need to activate all the subscriber accounts starting with the range 9900XXXXXX without activating the other subscriber accounts. 

Unfortunately, the start_contract_activation does not support any kind of filter (as you can enter only the Ref Date and the Max Throughput). 

Is there any other option how to bulk activate them without the need to develop a program that calls the activation web service of CC with the chargingContractActivate service operation in bulk for all the contracts?

Any suggestion/hint is highly appreciated.

Thank you,

Doris

entry.title: Re: How to Activate only a specific range of Subscriber A...
entry.content:
Hello, 

the only way is to use the web service, see Activate charging contracts in bulk. There is no other way to do it.

Best regards,

Eric F.

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Re: Objects are imported but not generated when moved to production system
entry.content: Why are they not successfully imported and generated? Did you check the transport log and the SAP notes? Or contact SAP Support? After fixing it, import the transport request again.

entry.title: How to define correct FI organizational structure to suitable for customer's require?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I studied a lot about FI organizational structure and integration structure, but I am very confused about how to define correct FI organization, is suitable for a customer's business. I still can not understand clearly about the concepts of organizational structure of SAP.
Let me give you a case study:
My customer has 3 branches in the same country. They want a company code for the parent company, the subsidiaries will be profit centers. They asked us to come up with solutions and analyze advantages and disadvantage? I feel very helpless in this case.

Through this case, Can you explain the criteria to define an organizational structure. What are the important implications and recommendations when building an organizational structure?

------ I am a junior, I'm thankful to everyone for reading my post. Have a good day. -------

#SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN (Finance) #SAP FI #Organization structure

entry.title: Re: How to define correct FI organizational structure to suitable for customer's require?
entry.content:
Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in ERP Q&A or Financial  Management Q&A: Enterprise Resource Planning Q&A | SAP Community or Financial Management Q&A | SAP Community.

NB: hopefully, moderators fix it for you from time to time.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic parallel processing in SAP S/4HANA flexible w...
entry.content:
Hi @SBach ,

I have used below code in IF_SWF_FLEX_IFS_RUN_APPL_STEP~ON_CREATION_CALLBACK.

 

data itab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF gnetw.
    APPEND 30 to itab.
    APPEND 40 to itab.
    DATA(lo_container) = io_context->get_task_container( ).
    lo_container->set( EXPORTING name = 'Amount'
                         value = itab ).

 

 But the task container in the workflow log shows same value in both the runtime instances of the task.

 

Also I used the amount expression in the workitem text, however it did not update the workitem text as seen in the workflow log screenshot above.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content: Hello Ryan,

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Filter condtion set up on oDATA API ( API_SALE...
entry.content:
Hello Ryan, I tried with several formats suggested by SAP notes.
with the note KBA 2933028 , I also tried with my first attempt with this filter condition
$filter=(CreatedByUser eq 'RFC_BTP_DEV' and (CreationDate eq datetimeoffset'2021-01-05T15:16:23'))
it didn't work out.

entry.title: Re: Report for Creation and Change of master data History...
entry.content:
Hello Krishna,

For the bank :

Data source FINHBACTB -- shows the detiails of the bank account. However this does not show change history or creation  / Changed details.

For Supplier and Customer, you can use Change collector under application and user management. That gives you all the details of the changes performed for selection (Similar to changes tab in the supplier)

Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: Execute CHBD in background
entry.content: We have similar requirement where we want to automate the proposal of next bin during the Exception code

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
hello All,

I am located at Pune , the culturally rich & technologically advanced city in India.

Originally I from Mumbai,it's twin city , where I was born & bought up.

I have migrated to Pune 6 years back for good.

I loved Pune, for it's pleasant ,cool weather, relatively lesser people congestion as compared to Mumbai or other populated cities, for it's IT HUB and automotive manufacturing companies & overall other oppournities that it offers.

Also it's famous for it's culture & heritage.

I have joined the world of SAP in July 2007, when my organisation gave an oppournity to it non-sap employees to shift into SAP. We were given SAP classroom training sponsored by company after which we gave SAP certification exam.

Since then it's been a roller coaster ride in SAP across 3 organisations, working on multiple clients for SAP implementation projects.

Every passing year, SAP world seems to grow & we keep learning, hearing new things.

I feel happy to join this SAP blogger community so that I can learn from others and contribute by posting SAP blogs.

Thanks 

Umesh Karane.

Pune,India

entry.title: Re: Request for digital skills initiative by SAP Learning

Hi @mohanpriya ,

Please go through the open sap and learning hub courses . these are very helpful . 

Regards ,

Azmath.

entry.title: Re: Code Descriptions in Reports out of EC
entry.content: check screenshot FYR.

entry.title: Re: storie report position
entry.content:
Not providing exact details...

This can be done by creating a calculated column based on the Effective Start Date of the position when vacant. In other words, it would be the days between the Effective Start Date and Today(). I would need to do some testing to see if you can get more sophisticated per your requirement of Months & Days.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Cairo (Egypt) 2024
entry.content:
Join the SAP Inside Track Event in Cairo, Egypt!

This is a fantastic opportunity to connect with fellow SAP enthusiasts, learn from Industry experts, dive deep into the latest trends and innovations with in the SAP ecosystem. Whether you're an experienced SAP professional or just starting in the field, this meetup promises valuable takeaways and fosters connection.

Agenda Themes:
1. GEN AI on SAP
2. Rise with SAP
3. Grow with SAP
4. SAP BTP
5. Sustainability

Date: Saturday, July 20, 2024
Time: 10:30 AM to 4:00 PM Cairo Time
Location:  Sofitel Cairo Nile El Gezirah

Registration: We need you for our agenda! This is your moment to share with the SAP Community in Egypt a topic from the Agenda Themes!

Submit your session here: https://forms.gle/q5cZL9S6Lsjy5Hnf8 

After we receive your submission, the team will make up the agenda and come back to you. We will keep the submission open till July 1st.

The earlier we can make the agenda the earlier we can share it with you! 

Don’t miss out this exciting opportunity to be part of the SAP Community in Cairo, Egypt. We look forward to seeing you there!
